div.h1: Pointer-Based BST: One Cache Miss Per Level
div.p: Each pointer hop → new heap allocation → new cache line fetch

g.text: Level n | RAM miss | ~200+ cycles each
Each pointer chase = potential cache miss

div.p: Heap Address Space (fragmented): 0x7F1000: [Node A] ←── root 0x7F2A40: [Node B] ←── A.left (158 KB away!) 0x7F1840: [Node C] ←── B.right (47 KB away) 0x7F3100: [Node D] ←── C.left (62 KB away) ... Problem: No spatial locality!

ul.li: Parent and child rarely in same cache line
